data.title: Daktronics Rallies As Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Big Installs Shine Bright
data.description: Daktronics announces Q2 FY25 results with sales up 4.5% Y/Y and net income of $21.4 million. CFO search underway.

data.title: UnitedHealth Group Issued 2025 Guidance Ahead Of Now Stopped Investor Conference
data.description: UnitedHealth Group unveils 2025 financial outlook with sales reaching $450 billion-$455 billion and highlights from its Optum and UnitedHealthcare divisions.
